name: 霸氣反擊型
description: 女主面對壓迫時不卑不亢、強硬回擊的對白。特點是語言簡短有力，常用反問句和比喻，將對方的攻擊反彈回去。這類對白是爽文短劇的核心，每句話都讓觀眾感到解氣。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Bunch of losers couldn't even catch my car's exhaust fumes. Go back to driving school and practice. ... He splashed wine on me. He should have known. I'm not to be messed with.
